category_sources: source_facts.description says color-highlighted diff output; official homepage describes colordiff as a wrapper for diff with syntax highlighting.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is colordiff; official homepage and GitHub repository use colordiff.
docs_sources: Official homepage links the man page and GitHub source tree; official GitHub README contains usage and options.
repo_sources: Official colordiff homepage says the current development source tree is available at GitHub and links daveewart/colordiff.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage/README describe diff wrapping, colored terminal output, Perl implementation, and CLI usage.
